mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, compressing required returns and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in 60% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 8.0 percent, labor market deterioration signals severe corporate earnings contraction, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in 55% of triggered months or the signal loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer and business demand recovery, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in 65% of cases or the interaction term coefficient is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in industrial production below negative two percent reflects acute supply-side contraction that forces immediate equity repricing, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Weekly forward returns are positive in 70% of triggered instances or the signal fails to predict direction during non-recessionary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls directly increase aggregate household income and consumption capacity, supporting corporate revenue growth and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.01 over a 5-year rolling window or payroll growth shows no correlation with monthly equity returns.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index annualized growth exceeds 4.0 percent, inflationary pressures force anticipated monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns are positive in 60% of triggered observations or the inflation threshold fails to predict market direction in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based economic demand strength, reducing recession risk premiums and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative returns in 65% of cases or the interaction effect vanishes when controlling for interest rate changes.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence where unemployment rises while payrolls decline signals structural labor market breakdown, triggering immediate risk-off flows and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Weekly forward returns are positive in 70% of triggered instances or the divergence pattern shows no predictive power outside severe downturns.
